sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׁוחיה

Transliteration: yeshôchâyâh

Phonetic: yesh-o-khaw-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Jeshohaiah = "Jehovah humbles"
  1. a descendant of Shimei and a chief of the Simeonites

Origin: from the same as H3445 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
